description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by a distinctive orange-brown wooden or polymer handguard and curved magazine. The stock is a skeletonized, folding type, providing both stability and portability. The pistol grip is ergonomically shaped and made of black polymer or composite material. The rifle is equipped with standard iron sights and a slotted flash hider at the muzzle. The overall construction suggests a robust, utilitarian firearm suitable for urban environments, with visible screws and mechanical details indicating functional moving parts.
description: A black and orange-brown rifle with a skeletonized folding stock, curved magazine, and iron sights, featuring a robust, utilitarian build.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the folding stock, curved magazine, and handguard.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the alignment of the barrel, iron sights, and the width of the magazine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features but showing the ejection port and more detail on the folding stock.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the magazine curvature, trigger guard, and the underside of the stock.
